tasks.description: Create git checkpoint before Phase 1. Use checkpoint tool to save named snapshot 'pre-chat-fixes'. This provides rollback if the streaming hot path changes introduce regressions.
tasks.acceptance: checkpoint save returns success. No files modified yet.

tasks.description: Fix stream_end to call _add_message before destroying streaming frame. When the LLM completes, read the accumulated text from _streaming_message_ref, call _add_message('assistant', text, sources=None, timestamp=timestamp) to create a permanent bubble, THEN destroy the streaming frame. Add _streaming_finalized: bool flag initialized False in _create_chat_page. Set it True in stream_end handler after calling _add_message. Check it at the start of _handle_streaming_token to guard against double-finalization. In the exception path, use stream_destroy (not stream_end) so _add_message is called before cleanup. Key changes: (1) stream_end handler: read ref text → _add_message → set _streaming_finalized=True → destroy frame. (2) exception path: put stream_destroy not stream_end. (3) _handle_streaming_token: early return if _streaming_finalized is True.
tasks.acceptance: Submit a question. Complete assistant answer remains permanently visible after streaming ends. Cancel mid-stream: partial answer appears as permanent bubble. Exception during streaming: partial content preserved. _streaming_finalized prevents double _add_message calls if stream_end is processed twice.

tasks.description: Add self._streaming_finalized = False to _do_clear_chat. After destroying all chat_frame children and clearing _expanded_pills and _snippet_frame_* attrs, also set self._streaming_message_ref = None, self._streaming_message_frame = None, and self._streaming_finalized = False. This ensures subsequent queries start from clean streaming state even if Clear was clicked mid-stream.
tasks.acceptance: Click Clear during active streaming, then submit a new question. New streaming message appears without errors. _streaming_message_ref and _streaming_message_frame are both None after clear.

tasks.description: Add automatic pruning of old messages in _add_message. Before packing a new message frame, count widgets in chat_frame.winfo_children(). If count exceeds MAX_CHAT_WIDGETS (set to 50, approximately 25 user+assistant message pairs — bounding UI memory to ~5MB for typical messages), destroy the oldest 10 widgets before adding the new one. This prevents unbounded memory growth in long sessions while keeping recent conversation visible.
tasks.acceptance: Submit 60+ questions. Chat frame never contains more than 50 message widgets. Memory stable over extended use. Pruning is invisible to user — only oldest messages are removed.

tasks.description: Add schema validation to message processor. For each msg type branch, validate len(msg) before accessing msg[1], msg[2]. If validation fails, log a warning and continue: logger.warning('Malformed queue message: %r', msg). This prevents IndexError crashes from malformed tuples without crashing the processor.
tasks.acceptance: Inject malformed queue tuple — message processor logs warning and continues processing. No crash, no IndexError.

tasks.description: Replace bare 'except Exception: pass' in stream_end handler (app_gui.py ~line 1976) and stream_destroy handler (~line 1986) with 'except Exception as e: logger.warning("stream handler error: %s", e)'. This preserves error visibility for debugging while maintaining the defensive shutdown-race pattern.
tasks.acceptance: When a stream handler catches an exception, warning is logged with the exception message. No silent exception swallowing. Existing tests pass.

tasks.description: Add self._message_processor_running: bool = True in _create_chat_page. In _start_message_processor loop, check this flag on each iteration and break if False. Set to False in _on_close before calling destroy(). This ensures the loop exits cleanly when the window is closing, preventing callbacks on destroyed widgets.
tasks.acceptance: Start a long query, close the application mid-operation. No TclError or uncaught exception in console. Message processor loop exits cleanly.

phases.name: Run full test suite and verify fixes

tasks.description: Run pytest tests/ -v with a focus on streaming-related tests. Run: pytest tests/test_app_gui_streaming_callback.py tests/test_app_gui_streaming_task42_retry2.py tests/test_app_gui_streaming_retry.py tests/test_app_gui_chat_widget_memory_cleanup.py tests/test_llm_interface_streaming.py -v. Additionally run full suite: pytest tests/ -v. All tests must pass with zero failures and zero errors.
tasks.acceptance: pytest exit code 0. Zero failures, zero errors. All streaming-related tests pass. All other tests pass.
